events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail** at **high risk**. Riser-rated (CMR) cable installed in a plenum air-handling space violates NEC 800.154(b), since riser cable lacks the flame-spread/smoke-production rating required for plenum use — a genuine fire/smoke-propagation life-safety issue, not a cosmetic defect. Since the work is only rough-complete, the corrective action (swap in CMP-listed cable, verify space classification per TIA-569, re-inspect) is straightforward now but must happen before closeout.
